title: Google AI Search and the Future of the Web
description: Recent reports discuss the impact of Google's AI search on the open web and traffic control.

sources.title: How Google’s A.I. Search Is Imperiling the Open Web
Google built the gateway to the web, but AI may change who controls the traffic
Google Claims AI Search Sends Quality Clicks, Without Sharing Data

sections.heading: Impact on the Open Web
paragraphs: According to The New York Times, Google's AI search is imperiling the open web.

sections.heading: Traffic Control Dynamics
paragraphs: The Baton Rouge Business Report states that Google built the gateway to the web, but AI may change who controls the traffic.

sections.heading: Claims on Search Clicks
paragraphs: Search Engine Journal reports that Google claims AI search sends quality clicks, without sharing the data.

faq.q: What is the impact of Google's AI search on the web?
faq.a: According to The New York Times, Google's AI search is imperiling the open web.

faq.q: How might AI affect traffic control?
faq.a: The Baton Rouge Business Report notes that AI may change who controls the traffic, even though Google built the gateway to the web.

faq.q: Has Google shared data regarding AI search clicks?
faq.a: Search Engine Journal reports that Google claims AI search sends quality clicks, but the company does not share the data.

Google built the gateway to the web, but AI may change who controls the traffic
Google Claims AI Search Sends Quality Clicks, Without Sharing Data
